author: Kofi Mensah
quote: Roadmate turned a midnight flat tyre into a 15-minute minor inconvenience. The glassmorphic tracking card kept me calm while I waited.

author: Ama Serwaa
quote: Finally, a service that understands the value of time. No phone tag, just instant action. Professional and authoritative response.

author: David Osei
quote: The live tracking is a game changer. Knowing exactly who is coming and seeing them on the map removed all the anxiety of being stranded.
